## 小题集训——夯实基础

## |基础巩固

1.选A $y=\tan x 在 \left(-\frac{\pi}{2},\frac{\pi}{2}\right)$ 上单调递增，$-\frac{\pi}{5}>-\frac{3\pi}{7},$ $\therefore\tan\left(-\frac{\pi}{5}\right)>\tan\left(-\frac{3\pi}{7}\right)$ ,故选A.



2.选B当f（x）是奇函数时$\varphi=\frac{\pi}{2}$ +kπ（k∈Z），充分性不成立；当φ$=\frac{\pi}{2} 时 ,f(x)=A\cos\left(\omega x+\frac{\pi}{2}\right)=-A\sin\omega x,$ 为奇函数，必要性成立，故选B.



3.选B $-\frac{\pi}{2}+k\pi<2x-\frac{\pi}{3}<\frac{\pi}{2}+k\pi(k\in\mathbf{Z})$ ,得-$-\frac{\pi}{12}+\frac{k\pi}{2}<x<$ $\frac{5}{12}\pi+\frac{k\pi}{2}$ ( k∈$\mathbf{Z}),\therefore f(x)$ 的单调递增区间为

$\left(-\frac{\pi}{12}+\frac{k\pi}{2},\frac{5}{12}\pi+\frac{k\pi}{2}\right)(k\in\mathbf{Z}).$ 



4.选C $y=2\sin^{2}x+\mathrm{s}$ in 2x=1-cos 2+sin $2x=\sqrt{2}\sin\left(2x-\frac{\pi}{4}\right)+$ $T=\frac{2\pi}{\omega}=\pi$ ∴函数$y=2\sin^{2}x+\sin$ 2x的最小正周期是π，故选C.



5.选B $f(x)=8\sin\left(\omega x-\frac{\pi}{3}\right)\quad(\omega>0)$ ）的最小正周期为π。

$$\therefore\omega=2,$$

$$\begin{aligned}&\therefore f(x)=8\sin\left(2x-\frac{\pi}{3}\right).\\ &\because-\frac{\pi}{24}\leqslant x\leqslant\frac{2\pi}{3},\\ &\therefore-\frac{5\pi}{12}\leqslant2x-\frac{\pi}{3}\leqslant\pi,\\ \end{aligned}$$

$$\because\frac{5\pi}{12}\leqslant2x-\frac{\pi}{3}\leqslant\frac{\pi}{2} 时 ,f(x 单调递增，$$

$$\frac{\pi}{2}\leqslant2x-\frac{\pi}{3}\leqslant\pi 时 ,f(x) 单调递减 ,$$

$$\therefore\left\{\begin{aligned}\frac{2m}{3}-\frac{\pi}{3}\leqslant\frac{\pi}{2},\\ m-\frac{\pi}{3}\geqslant\frac{\pi}{2},\end{aligned}\right.\therefore\frac{5\pi}{6}\leqslant m\leqslant\frac{5\pi}{4}$$

$$f(x)=\sin(x+\varphi)\quad 在 \quad\left(\frac{\pi}{3},\frac{2\pi}{3}\right) 上单调递增 $$

$$\left\{\begin{aligned}\frac{\pi}{3}+\varphi&\geqslant-\frac{\pi}{2}+2k\pi,\\ \frac{2\pi}{3}+\varphi&\leqslant\frac{\pi}{2}+2k\pi,\end{aligned}\right. 解得 2k\pi-\frac{5\pi}{6}\leqslant\varphi\leqslant2k\pi-\frac{\pi}{6},$$

$$k=1 时 ,\frac{7\pi}{6}\leq\varphi\leq\frac{11\pi}{6},\therefore\varphi 的值可能是$$

$$的值可能是\frac{3\pi}{2}, 故选 D.$$

7.选D $y=\sin2x$ 在$\left(\frac{\pi}{2},\pi\right) 及$ 上不单调，排除A；

$y=2\left|\cos x\right| 在 \left(\frac{\pi}{2},\pi\right).$ 上单调递增，排除B；

$y=\cos\frac{x}{2}$ -的最小正周期为4π，排除C；

$y=\tan(-x)$ 的最小正周期为π，且在区间$\left(\frac{\pi}{2},\pi\right).$ 上为减函数，故选D.



$$0\leqslant x\leqslant9,\therefore-\frac{\pi}{3}\leqslant\frac{\pi}{6}x-\frac{\pi}{3}\leqslant\frac{7}{6}\pi,$$

$$-\frac{\sqrt{3}}{2}\leqslant\sin\left(\frac{\pi}{6}x-\frac{\pi}{3}\right)\leqslant1,$$

$$-\sqrt{3}\leqslant2\sin\left(\frac{\pi}{6}x-\frac{\pi}{3}\right)\leqslant2,$$

$$∴函数y=2\sin\left(\frac{\pi}{6}x-\frac{\pi}{3}\right)$$

$$\frac{2\pi}{2}=\cos\left(x+\frac{\pi}{4}\right)\sin x=\frac{1}{2}\sin\left(2x+\frac{\pi}{4}\right)-\frac{\sqrt{2}}{4}$$

$$\begin{aligned}& 解法二:\sin\left(\frac{a}{2}-\frac{\pi}{4}\right)\cos\left(\frac{a}{2}+\frac{\pi}{4}\right)=-\frac{3}{4},\\&\therefore\sin\left(\frac{a}{2}-\frac{\pi}{4}\right)\cos\left(\frac{\pi}{2}+\frac{a}{2}-\frac{\pi}{4}\right)=-\frac{3}{4},\\&\therefore-\sin\left(\frac{a}{2}-\frac{\pi}{4}\right)\sin\left(\frac{a}{2}-\frac{\pi}{4}\right)=-\frac{3}{4},\\&\therefore\sin^2\left(\frac{a}{2}-\frac{\pi}{4}\right)=\frac{3}{4},\\&\therefore\frac{1-\cos\left(a-\frac{\pi}{2}\right)}{2}=\frac{3}{4},\\&\therefore\frac{1-\sin a}{2}=\frac{3}{4},\therefore\sin a=-\frac{1}{2}.\\& 答案:-\frac{1}{2}\end{aligned}$$

25.解：（1）由正弦定理及已知3csinB=4asinC，得$3bc=4ac$ ∴3b=4a，

$$b+c=2a,\therefore b=\frac{4}{3}a,c=\frac{2}{3}a.$$

$$\cos B=\frac{a^{2}+c^{2}-b^{2}}{2ac}=\frac{a^{2}+\frac{4}{9}a^{2}-\frac{16}{9}a^{2}}{2\cdot a\cdot\frac{2}{3}a}=-\frac{1}{4}$$

$$\cos B=-\frac{1}{4} ，B∈$$

$$，B∈\in(0,\pi),\therefore\sin B=\frac{\sqrt{15}}{4},$$

$$\therefore\sin2B=-\frac{\sqrt{15}}{8},\cos2B=-\frac{7}{8},$$

$$\because\sin\left(2B+\frac{\pi}{6}\right)=\sin2B\cos\frac{\pi}{6}+\cos2B\sin\frac{\pi}{6}=-\frac{3\sqrt{5}+7}{16}.$$

## 大题精练

$$26.解：f(x)=\cos2x+\frac{\sqrt{3}}{2}\sin2x-\frac{1}{2}\cos2x $$

$$\frac{\sqrt{3}}{2}\sin2x+\frac{1}{2}\cos2x=\sin\left(2x+\frac{\pi}{6}\right)$$

∴函数f（x）的最小正周期T=π.

$$f(a)=\frac{1}{3}, 可得 \sin\left(2a+\frac{\pi}{6}\right)=\frac{1}{3}.$$

$$\because a\in\left(0,\frac{\pi}{2}\right),\therefore2a+\frac{\pi}{6}\in\left(\frac{\pi}{6},\frac{7\pi}{6}\right),$$

$$0<\sin\left(2a+\frac{\pi}{6}\right)=\frac{1}{3}<\frac{1}{2},\therefore2a+\frac{\pi}{6}\in\left(\frac{\pi}{2},\pi\right)$$

$$\therefore\cos\left(2a+\frac{\pi}{6}\right)=-\frac{2\sqrt{2}}{3},$$

$$\therefore\cos2a=\cos\left[\left(2a+\frac{\pi}{6}\right)-\frac{\pi}{6}\right]$$

$$\cos\left(2\alpha+\frac{\pi}{6}\right)\cos\frac{\pi}{6}+\sin\left(2\alpha+\frac{\pi}{6}\right)\sin\frac{\pi}{6}=\frac{1-2\sqrt{6}}{6}.$$

27.解：(1）因为α∈$\left(\frac{\pi}{2},\pi\right),\cos a=-\frac{3}{5}$ ,所以sina=$\sqrt{1-\cos^{2}a}=$ 

$$\sqrt{1-\left(-\frac{3}{5}\right)^{2}}=\frac{4}{5}.所以\tan a=\frac{\sin a}{\cos a}=-\frac{4}{3}.$$

$$(2)由(1)知.\sin a=\frac{4}{5},\cos a=-\frac{3}{5},$$

$$\sin2a=2\sin a\cos a=2\times\frac{4}{5}\times\left(-\frac{3}{5}\right)=-\frac{24}{25}$$

$$\cos2a=2\cos^{2}a-1=2\times\left(-\frac{3}{5}\right)^{2}-1=-\frac{7}{25}.$$

$$\frac{\cos2a}{\sin2a+1}=\frac{-\frac{7}{25}}{-\frac{24}{25}+1}=-7.$$

\because\frac{\sin a-2\cos a}{\sin a+\cos a}=2,\therefore\frac{\tan a-2}{\tan a+1}=2,
f(x)=2\tan x+\frac{1-2\sin^{2}\frac{x}{2}}{\frac{1}{2}\sin x}=2\tan x+\frac{2\cos x}{\sin x}=\frac{2\sin x}{\cos x}+

\begin{aligned}24. 解析:解法一:&\sin\left(\frac{a}{2}-\frac{\pi}{4}\right)\cos\left(\frac{a}{2}+\frac{\pi}{4}\right)=-\frac{3}{4},\\&\therefore\left(\frac{\sqrt{2}}{2}\sin\frac{a}{2}-\frac{\sqrt{2}}{2}\cos\frac{a}{2}\right)\left(\frac{\sqrt{2}}{2}\cos\frac{a}{2}-\frac{\sqrt{2}}{2}\sin\frac{a}{2}\right)=\\&-\frac{3}{4}, 化简得 ,\left(\cos\frac{a}{2}-\sin\frac{a}{2}\right)^{2}=\frac{3}{2},\\&\therefore1-2\sin\frac{a}{2}\cos\frac{a}{2}=\frac{3}{2},\therefore1-\sin a=\frac{3}{2},\\&\therefore\sin a=-\frac{1}{2}.\end{aligned}
f(x)=\sin(x+\varphi)\quad 在 \quad\left(\frac{\pi}{3},\frac{2\pi}{3}\right) 上单调递增

的最小正周期为π，且在区间
